page_metadata.biotools__summary: Transparent and flexible multiscale stochastic models in human, animal and plant epidemiology | EMULSION Manual — EMULSION (Epidemiological Multi-Level Simulation framework) | Framework EMULSION is intended for modellers in epidemiology, to help them design, simulate, and revise complex mechanistic stochastic models, without having to write or rewrite huge amounts of code
